headline: D4vd D4VASTATED 😱🔪 Tesla Trunk TRASHED 💀🧳
text: D4vd 🎤🕶️ aka David Anthony Burke 🍊👨‍⚖️ is facing the ULTIMATE nightmare fuel 🔥😱 as gruesome pics of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez 💔🧒 dismembered corpse popped up in court like a horror movie jump scare 🎥💀! Prosecutors dropped the MIC 🎤📉 saying the singer stabbed 🔪💉 then chainsaw-sliced 🪚🍖 the teen to hush 🤫🧨 her threat to expose years of alleged SA and torch his multi-million music empire 🏰💸! Burke ordered body bags 🛍️🪦 chainsaws 🪚🍕 an inflatable pool 🏊‍♂️🫧 and a shovel 🪏😈 online under an alias to turn the Tesla trunk into a gruesome DIY disposal zone 🚗💀! Detective Byers opened the cadaver bag and found decomposing torso + head 🤢🧠 plus bagged limbs 🦵🛍️ so wrecked even mom Mercedes couldn't recognize her baby 👩‍👧💧! Celeste's parents Patrick Steinfeld's clients were warned but still chose to stay and support their daughter like absolute warriors 🛡️❤️ even though they knew they'd never UNSEE those images 😭🚫! Burke rocked orange jail threads 🧡🔗 shackled at wrists and ankles but smiled at his defense squad like it was just another day in court 🥲⚖️! Tattoo tea spilled: matching 'Shhh...' 🤫💍 on both fingers plus 'Celeste' on his ring finger – proof they were linked like a cursed couple's bracelet 💍🔗! TikTokers YouTubers and the public lottery-crashed the packed LA courtroom for front-row tea ☕🎟️ while prosecutor Beth Silverman kept checking if Celeste's mom wanted to look away before each grisly pic 😰📸! This ain't the full trial yet but the evidence is stacking like a body-bag Jenga tower 🗼🧳 and prosecutors say enough proof to send it to a jury – D4vd's career might be the next thing getting chainsawed 🪚💸!
